events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need reason: scenario commercial construction, electrical equipment bonding, observed isolated metal parts, actively in-progress. Codes NEC 250.104 (bonding of piping systems and structural steel), 250.30 (grounding separately derived systems). Isolated metal parts = metal parts likely need bonding per NEC 250.104(D) and 250.6, isolated metal parts must be bonded to ensure low impedance path, prevent electric shock/fire. Severity high because metal parts could become energized, shock hazard, arc fault. Immediate controls: stop work, isolate circuit, bond isolated parts to equipment grounding conductor per NEC, inspect/test, notify inspector. Decision fail, risk high (or critical? Isolated metal parts not necessarily energized but shock risk severe; choose high). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 60. Provide JSON.

  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on affected equipment and circuits immediately",
    "Ensure circuits are de-energized and locked out/tagged out before corrections",
    "Bond isolated metal parts to the appropriate equipment grounding conductor or grounding electrode system per NEC",
    "Verify continuity and proper termination of bonding jumpers",
    "Schedule third-party inspection before re-energization"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.104 requires bonding of metal piping systems and structural steel, and isolated metal parts must be connected to the grounding/bonding system to prevent them from becoming energized. Leaving metal parts isolated during active electrical work creates a shock and fire hazard, so the installation is defective and non-compliant until properly bonded.",
  "references": ["NEC 250.104", "NEC 250.30"]
}
